complete. In particular check center plate up/down direction to be compatible with transmission unit. It is easy to make a mirrored version which won't work with the usual transmission. Here is a PowerPoint slide showing how the two drive motors sho

erPoint slide showing how the two drive motors should be wired into the ImageProc Board. DXF files Warning these are not fully debugged ! see http://robotics.eecs.berkeley.edu/~ronf/Prototype/index.html Attach:body_drawing.DXF.txt Δ Attach:fourbars

html Attach:body_drawing.DXF.txt Δ Attach:fourbars_drawing.DXF.txt Δ Four-Bar Mechanisms: Use Elmer's glue only to put together the 4-bar mechanisms. Other Chassis: Use Loctite 495 to glue on all right-angle joints and Elmer's glue on all lap joints.
